Character|hasAlias|Alias: A character can be known by one or more aliases.
Each character record links to the aliases they use.
In the schema, a character has an alias.
Alias|isAliasOf|Character: An alias is an alias of a character.
Every alias points back to the character it identifies.
The model records that an alias belongs to a character.
Character|hasRank|Rank: A character holds a rank in the Arena ranking.
Each character can be assigned a rank.
The schema gives a character a rank.
Rank|isRankOf|Character: A rank is the rank of a character.
Every rank grade is held by a character.
The model links a rank back to its character.
Entity|participatesIn|MajorEvent: An entity participates in a major event.
Each major event lists the entities that take part in it.
The schema records that an entity participates in a major event.
MajorEvent|involvesEntity|Entity: A major event involves an entity.
Every major event involves one or more entities.
The model states that a major event involves an entity.
Boss|isBossOf|MajorEvent: A boss is the boss of a major event.
Each major event can be led by a boss.
The schema records that a boss is boss of a major event.
MajorEvent|hasBoss|Boss: A major event has a boss.
Every major event can have a boss.
The model links a major event to its boss.
MajorEvent|takesPlaceIn|Place: A major event takes place in a place.
Each major event is located in a place on Rubicon 3.
The schema records that a major event takes place in a place.
Place|hostsEvent|MajorEvent: A place hosts a major event.
Every place can host a major event.
The model states that a place hosts a major event.
Character|pilots|ArmoredCore: A character pilots an armored core.
Each armored core is operated by a character.
The schema records that a character pilots an armored core.
ArmoredCore|isPilotedBy|Character: An armored core is piloted by a character.
Every armored core is piloted by a character.
The model links an armored core to its pilot character.
Character|kills|Character: The record notes when one character kills another.
The schema records that a character kills a character.
Character|isKilledBy|Character: A character is killed by another character.
The model records that a character is killed by a character.
Each defeated character is killed by a character.
Character|worksFor|Society: A character works for a society.
Each character can be affiliated with a society.
The schema records that a character works for a society.
Society|employs|Character: The model links a society to the characters it employs.
Entity|isFriendlyTowards|Entity: An entity is friendly towards another entity.
Allies are entities friendly towards each other.
The schema records that an entity is friendly towards an entity.
Entity|isHostileToward|Entity: An entity is hostile toward another entity.
Enemies are entities hostile toward each other.
The schema records that an entity is hostile toward an entity.
ArmoredCore|acName|LiteralValue: An armored core has a name stored as a literal value.
Each armored core stores its AC name as text.
The schema records an armored core name as a literal value.
ArmoredCore|isSpecial|LiteralValue: An armored core records whether it is special as a literal value.
Each armored core stores a special flag as a literal value.
The schema marks an armored core as special with a literal value.
Society|name|LiteralValue: A society has a name stored as a literal value.
Each society stores its official name as text.
The schema records a society name as a literal value.
Society|originatesOnRubicon|LiteralValue: A society records whether it originates on Rubicon as a literal value.
Each society stores an origin-on-Rubicon flag as a literal value.
The schema marks a society Rubicon origin with a literal value.
MajorEvent|chronologicalOrder|LiteralVal: A major event has a chronological order stored as a literal value.
Each major event stores its timeline position as a literal value.
The schema records a major event chronological order as a literal value.
Boss|rdfs:subClassOf|Character: A boss is a kind of character.
In the schema, every boss is a character.
Boss is modeled as a subclass of character.
Character|rdfs:subClassOf|Entity: A character is a kind of entity.
In the schema, every character is an entity.
Character is modeled as a subclass of entity.
Human|rdfs:subClassOf|Character: A human is a kind of character.
In the schema, every human is a character.
Human is modeled as a subclass of character.
AI|rdfs:subClassOf|Character: An AI is a kind of character.
In the schema, every AI is a character.
AI is modeled as a subclass of character.
Rubiconian|rdfs:subClassOf|Character: A Rubiconian is a kind of character.
In the schema, every Rubiconian is a character.
Rubiconian is modeled as a subclass of character.
Society|rdfs:subClassOf|Entity: A society is a kind of entity.
In the schema, every society is an entity.
Society is modeled as a subclass of entity.
Character|isBuddy|LiteralValue: A character records whether it is the player buddy as a literal value.
Each character stores a buddy flag as a literal value.
